feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,234Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Of Wolves and Penguin Promises
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,871Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: A year after promising Isabelle a real penguin, Peter decides World Penguin Day is the day to make good on it. The law disagrees. What follows involves failed wildlife acquisition, sponsored little blue penguins, gift shop overindulgence, and a brood that somehow gets even fluffier.

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,556Chapters: 8/14Kudos: 18

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

entry.title: The Clean Fight
entry.summary:
Author: Glyphemum

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,533Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 4

Summary: Welcome back to the campaign, where things are now officially no longer just bad polling and emotional repression. Part Two is where the public race and the hidden supernatural threat start crashing into each other: Lydia investigates the leak, Gerard begins tightening the trap, Kate gets sharper and crueler, the pack has to step further out of the shadows, and Derek keeps trying to win clean while everyone around him wonders whether clean is going to be enough. Stiles, unfortunately for his blood pressure, starts understanding Derek far too well, including the parts Derek is trying hardest to hide. There will be blackmail, wolfsbane, moral lines, terrible strategic options, the slowest of slow burns, and eventually one very important debate. Basically: welcome to the part where everyone’s secrets become campaign liabilities.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The nogitsune
entry.summary:
Author: UrNewtmas_ObsessedGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,801Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 85

Summary: When Stiles goes missing for three weeks and suddenly shows up at the loft, there's something off. His scent. Everything. And when his eyes glow gold instead of his usual brown, Derek knows something is horribly wrong. I suck at summary's.Tags will be updated as the story gets updated.

entry.title: To Safe Your Life
entry.summary:
Author: DoEScasTIElLove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,077Chapters: 2/11Kudos: 19

Summary: Scott has been turned into a werewolf just before their last year of high school. Managing him on full moons without any help turns almost fatal for Stiles until a dark, brooding wolf swoops in and saves his life. Apparently, he had to bite him to do that, not transforming him but bonding them together as mates.As it turns out, the Hale pack is alive and thriving, and the hunters are after them, but how could Stiles concentrate on that. He has to figure out what being werewolf mated to Derek actually means.

entry.title: the burning hill
entry.summary:
Author: mieczystiles

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 118,735Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 120

Summary: Just then, another rumble reverberates around. Stiles looks up, startled, but it’s not the clouds. It’s a wolf. It stares right at him from between the two trees that flank the clearing, eyes glowing, a vibrant shade of blue in the relative darkness.

entry.summary:

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,110Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 39

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride — so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous — and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

entry.title: Love on the Range
entry.summary:
Author: J_english

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 809Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: A Teen Wolf Au When a series of events leads him to the heart of a rugged ranch, Stiles Stilinski finds himself caught between small-town life and the thrill of the rodeo. An encounter with the mysterious ranch owner's nephew, Derek Hale, sparks a connection neither of them expected—one that challenges secrets, expectations, and family. As Stiles becomes immersed in ranch life and rodeo dreams, he must navigate new friendships, unexpected dangers, and the growing heat between him and the grumpy cowboy.

entry.title: Where Theory Meets Temptation
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,308Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Professor Scott is obsessed with making his brilliant student Derek the university’s all-time top ranker. His wife Stiles is a shameless, dripping slut who craves cock while her husband buries himself in work. When Derek struggles with female anatomy, clueless Scott strips Stiles naked on the table and uses her body as a living model — marking her fat tits, puffy pink pussy, and tight asshole with pens while explaining every part. Stiles moans like a whore, spreads her legs wider, and whispers to Derek, “Fuck your professor’s slutty wife while he draws.” What begins as innocent tutoring quickly turns into Derek secretly pounding Stiles's holes behind Scott’s back — filling her married cunt and ass while the proud professor praises his star student’s “dedication.” Scott never suspects his perfect wife has become his favorite student’s eager cumdump.

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,157,247Chapters: 56/?Kudos: 78

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Bonds that Bind
entry.summary:
Author: applejuice382

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 369,060Chapters: 24/25Kudos: 1,888

Summary: Stiles is just trying to prevent the next supernatural problem from killing his friends. Derek is just trying to keep his pack alive (and ignore the desperation that crawls under his skin whenever Stiles is near). When Stiles goes into the preserve to investigate a string of murders, he and Derek are kidnapped by an unknown group and locked in a basement with no escape. Each night brings new suffering, and each day they have only each other. The two will have to learn how to lean on one another to keep their sanity intact, and they’ll have to work together to escape. Too bad they annoy the shit out of each other.

entry.title: reach out and touch
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,104Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 84

Summary: Derek is hyperaware of every place he and Stiles are touching. Their fingers interlaced, the softness of Stiles’ skin, the coolness of it against Derek’s warmth.  He worries that if he moves his hand in the slightest, twitches his fingers accidentally, Stiles will move away, or judge him or make fun of him or see that Derek’s not really an alpha at his core, that he stole the role without earning it, that he’s really just a scared puppy underneath that cannot handle a simple touch, of all things. Or, five times Derek struggles with touch, and one time he gives it freely.

entry.title: Hale Blood, Stilinski Chaos, Dutton Country
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,180Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Stilinski & Hale family hit the Dutton Ranch and nothing stays calm for long. Isabelle draws attention she didn’t ask for, Peter gets possessive in record time, Derek decides bull riding is a personality now, and Stiles is 50% concern, 50% distracted appreciation. Beth Dutton stirs chaos like it’s cardio, Rip judges everyone equally, and John Dutton tries to keep the peace while slowly realizing that’s not happening. Cowboys, wolves, tension, and absolutely no emotional safety in sight.

entry.title: [Podfic] Trading Up
entry.summary:
Author: whimsicalmeerkat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Stiles is turning away from the stationery store he and his (maybe) girlfriend have been looking in to follow her to the next window when she softly says “Daaaamn” and steps three feet to the side, dropping his hand in the process. Confused, he looks over and follows her eyes to a man she’s staring at with a look on her face she’s definitely never directed at Stiles. ~ Stiles has to watch his date flirting with the most handsome man he’s ever seen. The story ends differently than he expects.Podfic of Trading Up by whimsicalmeerkat.
